SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2025 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BODILLY, JOEL RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ARCE, ASHER JAY $1,875.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, CROSS CLAIMANT JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF ASHER ARCE AND AGAINST JOEL BODILLY IN THE AMOUNTY OF $468.75. MR. ARCE SHALL PAYMR. BODILLY THE SUM OF $1,406.25 + $125 FOR A TOTAL OF $1,531.25 WITHIN 30 DAYS OR INTEREST WILL ACCRUE AT THE LEGAL RATE OF 10%.
